corrections_by_claim.note: The article mentions specific firms (TechInsights, Dedrone), but provides no data on their investment patterns or production logic.
No engagement with the source of profitability or the role of data extraction.
The article describes the state as a regulator/sanctioner, not as the constitutive force that built the firms' market power.
No discussion of profit rates or surplus appropriation.
No balance-sheet or asset composition data.
No theoretical engagement with the mode of production.
